mapper.update: UPDATE `state_record_remark` SET `state_record_id` = #{stateRecordId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `participant_user_id` = #{participantUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `participant_role_id` = #{participantRoleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `participant_type` = #{participantType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `action_type` = #{actionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `result` = #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `is_operator` = #{isOperator, jdbcType=TINYINT}, `score` = #{score, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `remark_content` = #{remarkContent, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `is_final` = #{isFinal, jdbcType=TINYINT}, `sort_no` = #{sortNo, jdbcType=INTEGER} WHERE `remark_id` = #{remarkId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
